hook.command: n=0; while [ ! -x "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.engine/.venv/bin/python" ] && [ "$n" -lt 50 ]; do sleep 0.1; n=$((n+1)); done; [ -x "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.engine/.venv/bin/python" ] && exec "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.engine/.venv/bin/python" ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.engine/tools/memory/consolidate.py session-start

n=0; while [ ! -x "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.engine/.venv/bin/python" ] && [ "$n" -lt 50 ]; do sleep 0.1; n=$((n+1)); done; [ -x "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.engine/.venv/bin/python" ] && exec "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.engine/.venv/bin/python" ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.engine/tools/memory/consolidate.py session-start

n=0; while [ ! -x "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.engine/.venv/bin/python" ] && [ "$n" -lt 50 ]; do sleep 0.1; n=$((n+1)); done; [ -x "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.engine/.venv/bin/python" ] && exec "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.engine/.venv/bin/python" ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.engine/tools/memory/consolidate.py pre-compact
